_comment: Edit this file to add/remove/update models. Restart the app to apply changes.

_fields.name: Display name shown in menus
_fields.duration_options: List of supported durations in seconds
_fields.notes: Tooltip text shown when hovering the info icon (optional)

models.name: Kling 3.0 Pro
models.notes:
★ Ranked #1 for head-turn workflows

• Unmatched Physical Isolation: Best physics engine for moving the head while perfectly freezing shoulders and torso.
• Zero Drift: Highly resistant to AI wobble during slow movements like a 40° turn — camera stays absolutely locked.

models.name: Kling O1
models.notes:
★ Ranked #4 for head-turn workflows

• Enhanced Subject Consistency: Built as a unified multimodal model that locks onto an identity and refuses to let the face morph or warp as the head turns.

models.name: Kling 2.5 Turbo Pro
models.notes:
★ Ranked #2 for head-turn workflows

• Reliable Staple: Handles strict prompt instructions exceptionally well with high facial consistency.
• Cost-Effective Precision: Nearly the same mechanical accuracy as 3.0 at a fraction of the cost — best price/performance balance.

models.name: Kling V1.6
models.notes:
★ Ranked #7 for head-turn workflows

• Legacy Control: Still benefits from Kling's core focus on prompt adherence and physical logic.
• Limitation: May struggle with micro-adjustments of a lifelike human face compared to 2.5 or 3.0.

models.name: Kling V1.5
models.notes:
★ Ranked #7 for head-turn workflows

• Legacy Control: Still benefits from Kling's core focus on prompt adherence and physical logic.
• Limitation: May struggle with micro-adjustments of a lifelike human face compared to 2.5 or 3.0.

models.name: MiniMax Hailuo V2.3 Pro
models.notes:
★ Ranked #3 for head-turn workflows

• Forensic Cleanliness: Incredible temporal stability with no exposure flickering across frames — perfect clean slate.
• Photorealistic Skin Textures: Maintains natural, consistent lighting on faces without injecting artificial highlights during movement.

models.name: MiniMax Video (Base)
models.notes:
★ Ranked #5 for head-turn workflows

• Budget Stability: Offers much of the same temporal consistency and clean lighting as the Pro version.
• Best cheap option that preserves forensic integrity.

models.name: Hunyuan Video 1.5
models.notes:
★ Ranked #6 for head-turn workflows

• Anti-Jitter Architecture: Specifically designed to reduce frame-to-frame jitter — crucial for slow, smooth motion.
• Strong Silhouettes: Keeps the subject's outline sharp against the background, preventing warp as the head moves.
